options.name: --sha1
options.description: A hex-encoded SHA-1 thumbprint of the certificate used to sign the executable.

options.name: --certificate
options.description: A path to a PFX file to perform the signature.

options.name: --password
options.description: The password for the PFX file.

options.name: --timestamp
options.description: A URL of the timestamping server to timestamp the signature.

options.name: --timestamp-algorithm
options.description: The digest algorithm of the timestamp.

options.name: --file-digest
options.description: The digest algorithm of the files.

options.name: --force
options.description: Force the signature by overwriting any existing signatures.

options.name: --azure-key-vault-url
options.description: The URL to an Azure Key Vault.

options.name: --azure-key-vault-certificate
options.description: The name of the certificate in Azure Key Vault.

options.name: --azure-key-vault-tenant-id
options.description: The Tenant ID to authenticate to the Azure Key Vault.

options.name: --azure-key-vault-client-id
options.description: The Client ID to authenticate to the Azure Key Vault.

options.name: --azure-key-vault-client-secret
options.description: The Client Secret to authenticate to the Azure Key Vault.

commands.name: unsign
commands.description: Removes all signatures from a VSIX package.

arguments.name: file
arguments.description: A path to the VSIX file.
